name: Luxury Watch Brand
prompt: Create a complete single-file HTML landing page for a luxury Swiss watch brand called 'AURENTIS'. Design language: ultra-premium, dark obsidian (#0A0A0A) background, gold (#C9A84C) and warm white (#F5F0E8) accents, wide editorial layout with extreme whitespace. Sections and requirements: (1) HERO — full viewport, the watch face rendered as a pure CSS circle with hour/minute/second hands that move in real time using JS Date(), concentric ring decorations in gold, brand name in a wide-tracked serif font (use Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond), a single tagline that fades in after 1.2s, a thin horizontal gold line that draws itself left-to-right on load using a CSS width animation; (2) CRAFT section — horizontal scroll area with 4 'material cards' (sapphire crystal, Swiss movement, alligator strap, titanium case), each card has a large background gradient simulating the material texture, a number counter that counts up to a spec value (e.g. '312 components') when scrolled into view via IntersectionObserver, and a subtle parallax offset on the card text vs background on mouse move; (3) COLLECTION grid — 3 watch models in a CSS grid, each with a gradient circle watch face, model name, price in CHF, and an 'Enquire' button with a border-draw hover animation (SVG rect stroke-dashoffset trick); (4) ATELIER section — full-width dark section with a quote in large italic serif, a timeline of 4 founding milestones with a vertical gold line connecting them, each milestone dot pulses once when scrolled into view; (5) FOOTER — minimal, centered logo mark (a CSS-drawn A monogram), social links as thin icon-less text links. Global: custom CSS cursor (a small gold crosshair that follows mouse with 60ms lag), smooth scroll, all scroll animations via IntersectionObserver, no external JS libraries, Google Fonts CDN only.

name: AI Productivity SaaS
prompt: Create a complete single-file HTML landing page for an AI productivity tool called 'COGNIFY'. Design language: clean tech, off-white (#FAFAF8) background, deep indigo (#1E1B4B) text, electric violet (#7C3AED) accent, Inter font from Google Fonts. Sections and requirements: (1) NAV — glassmorphism bar (white 70% opacity + backdrop-filter blur), logo as wordmark, 4 nav links with an animated underline that slides between them on hover, a 'Start Free' CTA button with a gradient fill that shifts on hover; (2) HERO — asymmetric two-column layout, left side has a large headline with one word highlighted by a violet underline that animates in width on load, a subheadline, two CTA buttons (primary gradient, secondary outlined), and social proof showing '14,000+ teams' with 5 stacked avatar circles (CSS gradient circles with initials); right side shows a 'product UI mockup' built entirely in HTML/CSS — a dark card simulating an AI chat interface with 3 pre-written message bubbles that type themselves in sequence using JS setTimeout and a typing indicator that appears between messages; (3) LOGOS strip — 'Trusted by teams at' followed by 6 company name placeholders in a marquee/ticker animation that loops left; (4) FEATURES — bento grid layout, 6 cards of varying sizes (2 large, 4 small) each with an icon built from CSS shapes, a feature title, one-line description, and a distinct subtle background pattern (dots, lines, or gradient) per card, cards lift on hover with box-shadow transition; (5) HOW IT WORKS — 3 steps in a horizontal layout connected by a dashed animated line (stroke-dashoffset animation on scroll), each step has a step number in a large light violet, title, and description; (6) PRICING — 3 tiers with a monthly/annual toggle, the Pro tier has a violet background inversion, a 'Most Popular' badge with a shimmer animation; (7) FAQ — accordion with smooth height transition, chevron rotates on open; (8) FOOTER — 4-column links grid, gradient top border. All animations triggered on scroll via IntersectionObserver.

name: Premium Skincare Brand
prompt: Create a complete single-file HTML landing page for a premium botanical skincare brand called 'VERDANE'. Design language: organic luxury, warm linen (#F7F3ED) background, forest green (#2D4A3E) primary, terracotta (#C4622D) accent, cream (#FFF8F0) cards, Playfair Display + DM Sans from Google Fonts. Sections and requirements: (1) NAV — transparent on top, transitions to linen background with box-shadow on scroll, logo as hand-drawn style text in Playfair Display italic, nav links in small caps DM Sans, a cart icon with an item count badge; (2) HERO — full viewport split layout, left 60% has large editorial headline spanning 3 lines with the word 'botanical' in terracotta italic, a paragraph, and a CTA; right 40% shows a product 'photo' as a tall rounded rectangle with a rich olive-to-amber CSS gradient + a subtle noise texture overlay achieved via an SVG feTurbulence filter, and a floating badge that rotates slowly ('100% Natural · Cruelty Free ·'); (3) PHILOSOPHY section — centered, large pull quote in Playfair Display italic, below it 3 ingredient cards (Bakuchiol, Sea Kelp, Rosehip) each with a botanical illustration built from CSS shapes (simplified leaf/circle compositions), ingredient name, and a two-line benefit; (4) RITUAL section — full-width green background, white text, a 3-step morning ritual shown as horizontal steps with large step numbers and a wavy SVG divider separating this section from the next; (5) PRODUCTS grid — 4 products in a 2×2 grid, each card has the gradient product image, name in serif, short tagline, price, and an Add to Routine button that turns green with a checkmark animation on click; (6) INGREDIENTS STORY — alternating left/right layout, 2 hero ingredients, text block with a botanical stat (e.g. '94% saw visible improvement in 28 days'), and a decorative CSS botanical motif; (7) TESTIMONIALS — horizontal scroll carousel with 3 review cards, star rating, reviewer name and skin type, review text, navigation arrows; (8) FOOTER — two-tone (green top half, linen bottom), newsletter input with a botanical-pattern-bordered submit button. Micro-animations: product cards tilt slightly on mouse move (CSS transform perspective), the rotating badge spins continuously, section entries fade+slide up via IntersectionObserver.

name: Dev Tool CLI Product
prompt: Create a complete single-file HTML landing page for a developer CLI tool called 'NEXUS' that manages cloud infrastructure. Design language: terminal-native aesthetic but elevated, pure black (#000000) background, phosphor green (#00FF41) primary accent, secondary cyan (#00D4FF), zinc (#71717A) for muted text, JetBrains Mono + Inter from Google Fonts. Sections and requirements: (1) NAV — black background, green logo with a blinking cursor character after it, nav links in mono font, a 'npm install -g nexus' command chip that copies to clipboard on click with a 'Copied!' tooltip flash; (2) HERO — full viewport, centered layout, above the headline a terminal prompt line '$  nexus init' types itself character by character on load, the main headline mixes mono and sans-serif font weights, a subheadline in zinc, below that a large terminal window UI built in HTML — dark card with a traffic-light dot row, a multi-line command sequence that runs in sequence with each line appearing after the previous, showing realistic CLI output (directory creation, file writing, 'Done in 0.4s'), a blinking block cursor at the end; (3) FEATURES — 4 cards in a 2×2 grid, each card has a green-to-transparent left border gradient, a terminal command as the feature name (e.g. 'nexus deploy --prod'), a description, and a small ASCII-art icon made of characters; (4) BENCHMARK section — dark section with a horizontal bar chart built in CSS showing Nexus vs 3 competitors on 3 metrics (Deploy Speed, Config Lines, Cold Start), bars animate width from 0 on scroll, Nexus bars in green, competitor bars in zinc; (5) CODE COMPARISON — two-panel side-by-side showing 'Before Nexus' (long YAML, grey/red) vs 'After Nexus' (short config, green), with syntax-colored spans, line numbers, and a visual diff highlight; (6) TRUSTED BY — logos as text-based ASCII-style company names in a grid; (7) PRICING — 3 tiers as terminal-style cards (bordered boxes drawn with ASCII box-drawing characters using CSS border), with a --flag style feature list; (8) CTA section — full green background for the first time on the page, black text, large mono headline, creates visual impact through inversion; (9) FOOTER — black, green accent links, a small live 'uptime' counter showing 99.97% with a pulsing green dot. Animations: terminal typing effects, bar chart growth on scroll, cursor blink keyframes, scan-line effect on hover over terminal windows using a repeating-linear-gradient overlay.

name: Architecture Studio Portfolio
prompt: Create a complete single-file HTML landing page for a high-end architecture studio called 'FORM & VOID'. Design language: brutalist minimalism, stark white (#FFFFFF) and pure black (#000000) with one accent — a raw concrete grey (#8C8C8C), GT America or system sans-serif with heavy weight contrast, extreme asymmetry, deliberate negative space. Sections and requirements: (1) NAV — white bar, studio name in ultra-bold black caps left-aligned, right side has a hamburger menu icon (3 lines as CSS divs) that transforms into an X and reveals a full-screen black overlay nav with 4 large white links that slide in staggered when opened; (2) HERO — split: left 35% is a black vertical band with white vertically-rotated text reading 'ARCHITECTURE STUDIO EST. 2009', right 65% is a white area with a massive headline 'FORM & VOID' where 'VOID' is a stroke-only outlined text (CSS -webkit-text-stroke), below it a single sentence manifesto, and a large grey number '014' indicating current project count that increments with a count-up animation on load; (3) FEATURED PROJECT — full-width section, project 'photo' as a dramatic black-to-grey gradient rectangle taking 60vh, project name overlaid at bottom-left in large white type, location and year in small grey mono, on hover the overlay dims and a 'View Project' text slides up from the bottom edge; (4) PROJECTS grid — asymmetric masonry-like grid of 5 projects using CSS grid with manually specified grid-column and grid-row spans, each project tile has a grey gradient background, alternates between portrait and landscape ratios, project name appears on hover with a sharp clip-path reveal animation (clip-path: inset(100% 0 0 0) → inset(0)), all tiles start black and white with a CSS grayscale filter that removes on hover; (5) STUDIO section — horizontal split, left side a dense block of justified text describing the studio philosophy in small body type, right side 3 key numbers (Awards, Projects, Countries) in massive black numerals with a thin grey label below each, numbers animate up on scroll; (6) PROCESS — a raw numbered list 01 through 05 (Brief, Concept, Development, Construction, Delivery), each item separated by a full-width black 1px rule, item number in a large light grey behind the text, hover on each row shifts the background to black and text to white with a left-to-right fill animation; (7) CONTACT section — black background, white text, a single large email address as a link with a custom hover that underlines it with a green (#00FF00) line — the one color moment on the page, creating maximum impact; (8) FOOTER — white, two columns: left has the full studio address and phone in mono, right has a copyright line. Global: no rounded corners anywhere (border-radius: 0 everywhere), custom cursor replaced with a simple 8×8 black square, page transitions use a black overlay wipe on internal anchor navigation, typography uses font-weight contrast aggressively (100 vs 900).
